name: Outreach: Stats

description.en: Return outreach touches filtered by template, variant, channel and date range. Powers reply-rate and A/B comparison views.
description.de: Outreach-Kontakte nach Template, Variante, Kanal und Zeitraum filtern. Basis für Response-Rate- und A/B-Vergleichs-Auswertungen.
description.es: Return outreach touches filtered by template, variant, channel and date range. Powers reply-rate and A/B comparison views.
description.fr: Return outreach touches filtered by template, variant, channel and date range. Powers reply-rate and A/B comparison views.
description.ro: Return outreach touches filtered by template, variant, channel and date range. Powers reply-rate and A/B comparison views.
description.it: Return outreach touches filtered by template, variant, channel and date range. Powers reply-rate and A/B comparison views.

bot: Use this to pull outreach-touch activities for analytics. Filter by templateId to compare variants, by channel to compare WhatsApp vs email vs LinkedIn, or by sinceDate for windowed analysis.

inputs.name: Template ID
inputs.bot: Stable slug like 'handwerk-seq-a-m1'. Omit to include all templates.

inputs.name: Variant
inputs.bot: Single token like 'a'. Omit to include all variants.

inputs.name: Channel
inputs.bot: One of whatsapp, sms, email, linkedin, post, call. Omit to include all channels.

inputs.name: Since

description.en: Only include touches after this date (ISO 8601, optional)
description.de: Nur Kontakte nach diesem Datum (ISO 8601, optional)
description.es: Only include touches after this date (ISO 8601, optional)
description.fr: Only include touches after this date (ISO 8601, optional)
description.ro: Only include touches after this date (ISO 8601, optional)
description.it: Only include touches after this date (ISO 8601, optional)

inputs.bot: ISO date like '2026-04-01'. Omit for full history.
